failures.description: The agent made an ill-formed ProductCatalogSearch call: it used product_id 0 instead of grounded string identifiers and omitted the required item_id 1345513440, causing a SchemaError.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal matched the user request: find the price of item 1345513440. The first failing action was the ProductCatalogSearch invocation prepared at index 2 with arguments {"product_id": 0}. The tool required string product_id and item_id, but the call omitted item_id and used an integer product_id. The schema error was explicitly reported when the tool executed at index 3, and the agent never corrected or retried the call.
